assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Regular channel will be force-upgraded to the next minor version (1.31) when 1.30 hits EoS
assertions.reason: Response clearly states that Regular channel clusters will undergo 'Automatic upgrade to 1.31' with both control plane and node pools being force-upgraded to the next supported minor version

assertions.expectation: Explains that clusters on Extended channel get up to 24 months of support, so 1.30 EoS is significantly later — they have more time
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions Extended channel clusters get 'up to 24 months' of support and during the extended support period 'No automatic minor upgrades', giving them more time and control

assertions.expectation: Explains that legacy 'No channel' clusters: control plane EoS minor versions are auto-upgraded to next supported minor, AND EoS node pools are force-upgraded even when 'no auto-upgrade' is configured
assertions.reason: Response states for No channel clusters: 'Control plane: Force-upgraded to 1.31' and 'Node pools: Force-upgraded to 1.31 even if no auto-upgrade is configured'

assertions.expectation: Mentions that a 'no upgrades' maintenance exclusion (30 days) can temporarily defer even EoS force-upgrades
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'No way to avoid it except temporary 30-day no upgrades exclusions' for Regular channel and provides specific gcloud commands for 30-day 'no upgrades' exclusions for No channel clusters

assertions.expectation: Recommends proactive upgrade planning rather than waiting for EoS enforcement
assertions.reason: Response includes 'Option 1: Proactive Manual Upgrades (Recommended)' and states 'The key is taking proactive control rather than waiting for forced upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE EoS notifications via Cloud Logging as a planning tool
assertions.reason: Response mentions 'scheduled upgrade notifications' but does not specifically mention Cloud Logging as a source for EoS notifications

assertions.expectation: Mentions the deprecation insights dashboard for checking API compatibility before the forced upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes gcloud command for checking deprecation insights: 'gcloud recommender insights list --insight-type=google.container.DiagnosisInsight' as part of compatibility checking

assertions.expectation: Warns that 'snowflaking' (manually freezing versions) should be avoided — it creates security and reliability risks
assertions.reason: Response does not mention 'snowflaking' terminology or explicitly warn about security and reliability risks of manually freezing versions, though it does recommend proactive upgrades
